first_checks: Confirm boiler temperature reached operating range.
Check if steam wand tip is blocked and clean if needed.
Ensure water tank or inlet is not empty.
likely_cause: Steam wand blockage or boiler not fully heated.
escalation_rule: Escalate if pressure stays low after cleaning and reheating for 10 minutes.

first_checks: Verify hopper is seated and safety switch is engaged.
Check for bean jam in burr entrance.
likely_cause: Safety lock not engaged or bean jam.
escalation_rule: Escalate if motor hum persists after jam removal.

first_checks: Check if water filter replacement is due.
escalation_rule: Escalate if slow flow continues after filter replacement.
